description: This rugged colour block shoe in two-tone leather by timberland is designed for the cosmopolitan male. Referencing the yacht shoe in design and cuts, this sturdy shoe has a woody outsole. Push the proverbial envelope with these shoes. UpperLeather upper with fabric overlayTwo-hole lace-up system for snug, customised FitShort leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wearStitch detailing for durability and styleFabric footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelMulti-directional lugs on the fore foot and heelShoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
